# iproute_rule (Data Source)

Read routing policy rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read all IPv4 routing policy rules
data "iproute_rule" "ipv4" {
  family = "inet"
}

# Read IPv6 rules
data "iproute_rule" "ipv6" {
  family = "inet6"
}

output "rules" {
  value = data.iproute_rule.ipv4.rules
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `family` (String) Address family (inet, inet6).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rules` (List of String) List of rules.
